experience.title: Professional Experience
wexDesc: Development using Full-Stack Java (Spring Boot), React, and Python.
Deployment tracking and maintaining reliable cloud structure on AWS.
Ensuring clean architecture principles and software quality.
jtechDesc: Optimized complex relational queries using PostgreSQL and CTEs.
Acted in comprehensive log monitoring and root cause analysis.
Assured code performance and optimized database integration structures.
serverDesc: Maintained and supervised cPanel/WHM structures and servers.
Provisioning and scaling EC2 clusters on AWS cloud infrastructure.
Advanced traffic filtering and active DDoS mitigation procedures.
softplanDesc: Provided Level 2 Technical Support to SAJ (Court of Justice Systems).
Diagnosed incidents regarding core APIs and legal tracking suites.
Collaborated extensively with dev teams for permanent bug fixes.
experience.otherDesc: Also worked with SCC4, WeDo, and NEXTAR throughout the career.
